steps.title: Set up the system from the given conditions
steps.content:
Distance: $$r + b = 200$$
Time: Since time = distance / speed, biked for twice as many hours as she ran gives:
$$\frac{b}{10} = 2 \cdot \frac{r}{5}$$

steps.title: Solve using substitution
steps.content:
• Simplify the time equation: $$\frac{b}{10} = \frac{2r}{5}$$
  • Multiply both sides by 10: $$b = 4r$$
  • Substitute $b = 4r$ into $r + b = 200$: $$r + 4r = 200$$
  • Solve: $$5r = 200$$, so $$r = 40$$
  • Therefore: $$b = 4(40) = 160$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
